args.code:
import pandas as pd
opportunities = locals()['var_function-call-17943876429266533424']
df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities)
df_opportunities = df_opportunities[df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].notnull()]

# Clean Id fields
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

# Convert CreatedDate to datetime
df_opportunities['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_opportunities['CreatedDate'])

contract_ids = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].unique().tolist()
# Join contract_ids with comma for SQL IN clause
contract_ids_str = "\'" + "\',\'".join(contract_ids) + "\'"

print("__RESULT__:")
print(contract_ids_str)

import pandas as pd
import json
opportunities = locals()['var_function-call-17943876429266533424']
df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities)
df_opportunities = df_opportunities[df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].notnull()]

# Clean Id fields
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

# Convert CreatedDate to datetime
df_opportunities['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_opportunities['CreatedDate'])

contract_ids = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].unique().tolist()

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(contract_ids))

import pandas as pd
import json
opportunities = locals()['var_function-call-17943876429266533424']
df_opportunities = pd.DataFrame(opportunities)
df_opportunities = df_opportunities[df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].notnull()]

# Clean Id fields
df_opportunities['Id'] = df_opportunities['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_opportunities['OwnerId'] = df_opportunities['OwnerId'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
df_opportunities['ContractID__c'] = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

# Convert CreatedDate to datetime
df_opportunities['CreatedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_opportunities['CreatedDate'])

contract_ids = df_opportunities['ContractID__c'].unique().tolist()

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(contract_ids))
